name: Sweet Potato Casserole/jr. League
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat sweet potatoes to boiling and drain.
2. Mash the potatoes with butter.
3. Add sugar, salt, eggs, milk, and vanilla; mix well.
4. Pour into an ungreased 9-inch square glass baking pan.
5. Mix brown sugar, butter, flour, and cinnamon until crumbly.
6. Stir in nuts.
7. Spread mixture on top of sweet potato layer.
8. Bake at 350°F for 40 minutes.
This dish can be made the day before and refrigerated before baking. It's very rich, but everyone loves it!
